title: JRN Cross-Task Transfer Analysis on rel-f1 and rel-stack
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed JRN (Join Reproduction Number) matrices from rel-f1 (5 tasks, 13 joins) and rel-stack (3 tasks, 11 joins) benchmarks. Reconstructs JRN matrices from 93 examples, then performs: leave-one-task-out transfer rho, pairwise Spearman rho, Kendall's W concordance, entity-table and task-type concordance analysis, universal vs task-specific join selection gap analysis, and cost-adjusted recommendations. Generates JRN heatmaps and concordance comparison bar charts. Uses original experiment parameters (no scaling needed since analysis is purely statistical on pre-computed results). Key findings reproduced: rel-f1 W=0.524, rel-stack W=0.206; both recommend per-task JRN.
